<div align="center">

# 🎙 VoiceID — Voice Authentication System

### *Your voice is your password.*

[![FastAPI](https://img.shields.io/badge/FastAPI-009688?style=flat-square&logo=fastapi&logoColor=white)](https://fastapi.tiangolo.com/)
[![React](https://img.shields.io/badge/React-61DAFB?style=flat-square&logo=react&logoColor=black)](https://react.dev/)
[![TypeScript](https://img.shields.io/badge/TypeScript-3178C6?style=flat-square&logo=typescript&logoColor=white)](https://www.typescriptlang.org/)
[![PyTorch](https://img.shields.io/badge/PyTorch-EE4C2C?style=flat-square&logo=pytorch&logoColor=white)](https://pytorch.org/)
[![SQLite](https://img.shields.io/badge/SQLite-003B57?style=flat-square&logo=sqlite&logoColor=white)](https://sqlite.org/)

A **production-grade biometric authentication platform** that verifies identity through voice — powered by ECAPA-TDNN speaker embeddings, liveness detection, and cosine similarity matching.

**Built by Bhanu Mahesh**

</div>

---

## 📸 Screenshots

<img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Home Page" width="100%"/>

> Landing page with animated orbital visualizer, feature stats, and use-case sections.

---

### 📝 Voice Enrollment — Signup
<img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Signup Page" width="100%"/>

> Users record two voice samples. Real-time waveform visualizer activates during recording. WebM → WAV converted in-browser.

---

### 🔐 Voice Authentication — Login
<img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Login Page" width="100%"/>

> Single voice passphrase verified against stored embedding. Liveness detection runs before any similarity comparison.

---

### 📊 Dashboard
<img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Dashboard" width="100%"/>

> Post-auth banking dashboard — credit card, balances, spending chart, quick actions, recent transactions, savings goals.

---

## 🧠 What This Project Does

VoiceID is **not a CRUD app**. It is a full AI pipeline system:

1. Records voice in the browser via **MediaRecorder API**
2. Converts raw WebM → **WAV (PCM, 16kHz, Mono, 16-bit)** in-browser
3. Runs **liveness detection** to block replay & deepfake attacks
4. Extracts a **192-dimensional speaker embedding** via ECAPA-TDNN
5. Stores or compares embedding using **cosine similarity**
6. Returns `{ auth, similarity, live_prob, reason }` to frontend

---

## 🏗️ Architecture

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│           FRONTEND  (React + TypeScript)         │
│   Home → Signup → Login → Dashboard             │
│   MediaRecorder → WebM → WAV → FormData         │
└────────────────────┬─────────────────────────────┘
                     │  HTTP multipart/form-data
                     ▼
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│            BACKEND  (FastAPI + Python)           │
│                                                  │
│  /signup/enroll          /auth/                  │
│       │                     │                    │
│  Load Audio           Load Audio                 │
│       │                     │                    │
│  Liveness Check ──── Liveness Check              │
│       │                     │                    │
│  ECAPA-TDNN ×2        ECAPA-TDNN ×1              │
│       │                     │                    │
│  Avg Embeddings       Cosine Similarity          │
│       │                     │                    │
│  → VoiceProfile       → AuthLog                  │
└────────────────────┬─────────────────────────────┘
                     │  SQLAlchemy ORM
                     ▼
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│              DATABASE  (SQLite)                  │
│  clients │ users │ voice_profiles │ auth_logs   │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 🤖 AI Model — ECAPA-TDNN

> **Emphasized Channel Attention, Propagation and Aggregation – Time Delay Neural Network**

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Output | 192D speaker embedding vector |
| Input | 16kHz Mono WAV (PCM) |
| Task | Speaker verification (1:1) |
| Key feature | Channel attention on discriminative frequencies |

### Cosine Similarity

```
similarity(A, B) = (A · B) / (‖A‖ × ‖B‖)
```

| Score | Decision |
|-------|----------|
| ≥ 0.85 | ✅ PASS |
| 0.70–0.85 | ⚠️ Borderline |
| < 0.70 | ❌ FAIL |

---

## 📁 Project Structure

```
voice-auth-system/
├── backend/
│   ├── app/
│   │   ├── main.py
│   │   ├── models/orm_models.py    # SQLAlchemy ORM
│   │   ├── routes/signup.py        # POST /signup/enroll
│   │   ├── routes/auth.py          # POST /auth/
│   │   └── core/embeddings.py      # ECAPA-TDNN inference
│   └── requirements.txt
│
└── frontend/
    └── src/
        └── pages/
            ├── Home.tsx
            ├── Signup.tsx
            ├── Login.tsx
            └── Dashboard.tsx
```

---

## 🗄️ Database Schema

```sql
clients         → id, name, api_key
users           → id, client_id (FK), external_user_id, display_name
voice_profiles  → id, user_id (FK), embedding (Text), model_name
auth_logs       → id, user_id, success, similarity, live_prob, reason
```

---

## 🔌 API Endpoints

### `POST /signup/enroll`
```bash
curl -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/signup/enroll \
  -H "x-api-key: dev-secret-key" \
  -F "external_user_id=user123" \
  -F "display_name=Bhanu Mahesh" \
  -F "file1=@sample1.wav" \
  -F "file2=@sample2.wav"
```
```json
{ "success": true, "user_id": 1 }
```

### `POST /auth/`
```bash
curl -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/auth/ \
  -H "x-api-key: dev-secret-key" \
  -F "external_user_id=user123" \
  -F "file=@login.wav"
```
```json
{ "auth": true, "similarity": 0.923, "live_prob": 0.981, "reason": null }
```

---

## 🛠️ Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology | Purpose |
|-------|-----------|---------|
| Frontend | React + TypeScript + Vite | UI + routing |
| Audio | MediaRecorder + Web Audio API | Record + convert voice |
| Backend | FastAPI + Uvicorn | REST API |
| AI | ECAPA-TDNN (PyTorch) | Speaker embeddings |
| Anti-spoof | Liveness model | Replay attack prevention |
| ORM | SQLAlchemy | DB models |
| Database | SQLite | Persistence |
| Signal | Torchaudio + NumPy | Resampling + averaging |

---

## ⚙️ Setup

### Backend
```bash
cd backend
python -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate
pip install -r requirements.txt
uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
```

### Frontend
```bash
cd frontend
npm install
npm run dev
```

- Backend → `http://127.0.0.1:8000`
- Frontend → `http://localhost:5173`
- API Docs → `http://127.0.0.1:8000/docs`

---

## 🔐 Security

| Layer | What it does |
|-------|-------------|
| API Key | `x-api-key` header on all endpoints |
| Liveness Detection | Anti-spoof on every audio request |
| Similarity Threshold | Tunable cosine cutoff |
| Auth Logging | Every attempt stored in `auth_logs` |

---

## 🚀 Future Improvements

- [ ] PostgreSQL + pgvector for scalable embedding search
- [ ] JWT authentication + refresh tokens
- [ ] Redis cache for hot embeddings
- [ ] GPU microservice for model inference
- [ ] 5+ enrollment samples per user
- [ ] Voice Activity Detection (VAD) pre-processing
